description: Portrait-orientation slogan poster over a photograph of a person's hand washing a dark-colored car with a yellow sponge, with sudsy water running down the wet vehicle body and a headlight visible at lower left; sunset light is in the trees in the background. Large bold caps text overlaid on the left reads 'IT'S TIME TO' (white) 'GET RIGHT' (bright yellow, distressed/textured font) 'WITH THE' (white) 'LAW' (very large yellow distressed font). Bottom left reads 'ICE.gov/IMAGE' and bottom right shows the DHS seal with the 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW; ICE.gov/IMAGE
